blocks.content: Each dashboard can contain multiple panels, each with a meaningful title that helps other users understand its purpose. After you save a dashboard, you can share it with others. Users with the appropriate permissions can edit the saved dashboard as needed.
To save the dashboard, complete the following steps:
When you've finished editing the panel, click **Save**.

In the save dialog:

a. Enter a **title** and **description** for your dashboard.

  b. Select a **folder** if applicable.

  c. Click **Save**.
Click **Back to dashboard** to return to the dashboard view.
Click **Exit edit** to leave edit mode and view your completed dashboard.
**Congratulations!** You've successfully created a dashboard with a logs visualization. Your dashboard is now saved and ready to share with your team.

---

### More to explore (optional)

- [Share dashboards and panels](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/share-dashboards-panels)
- [Set up generative AI features for dashboards](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/visualizations/dashboards/manage-dashboards/#set-up-generative-ai-features-for-dashboards)
